languages.label: javascript
Ruby
languages.code:
require "uri"
require "net/http"

url = URI("https://api.hyperzod.app/admin/v1/auth/user/all")

https = Net::HTTP.new(url.host, url.port)
https.use_ssl = true

request = Net::HTTP::Get.new(url)
request["accept"] = "application/json"
request["content-type"] = "text/plain"
request["x-api-key"] = "{{X-API-KEY}}"
request["x-tenant"] = "{{X-TENANT}}"

response = https.request(request)
puts response.read_body

languages.label: Python
languages.code:
import requests

url = "https://api.hyperzod.app/admin/v1/auth/user/all"

payload = {}
headers = {
   'accept': 'application/json',
   'content-type': 'text/plain',
   'x-api-key': '{{X-API-KEY}}',
   'x-tenant': '{{X-TENANT}}'
}

response = requests.request("GET", url, headers=headers, data=payload)

print(response.text)

languages.label: Python
languages.code:
import requests

url = "https://api.hyperzod.app/admin/v1/auth/user/all"

payload = {}
headers = {
   'accept': 'application/json',
   'content-type': 'text/plain',
   'x-api-key': '{{X-API-KEY}}',
   'x-tenant': '{{X-TENANT}}'
}

response = requests.request("GET", url, headers=headers, data=payload)

print(response.text)
